step_rationale: Renin-angiotensin system component; systemic marker linked to infarct size and thrombosis independent of atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: Renin elevation reflects renin-angiotensin system activation and systemic hemodynamic/inflammatory stress during infarction.
